ast.source: Unknown state reached while processing groups of lines
ast.target: 处理行组时遇到未知状态

ast.target: exitCode=%s 使用自定义错误处理器处理

ast.name: info
ast.source: custom error handler treated as success

ast.name: info
ast.source: handling as error: exitCode=%s stdErr=%s rejection=%o

ast.name: log

ast.target: [FAIL] 路径代表的不是文件或目录

ast.name: warn
ast.source: simple-git deprecation notice: git.silent: logging should be configured using the `debug` library / `DEBUG` environment variable, this will be an error in version 3
ast.target: simple-git 弃用通知：git.silent：日志记录应使用 `debug` 库 / `DEBUG` 环境变量进行配置，这在版本 3 中将成为错误

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate diff code block for today
ast.target: 为今天生成差异代码块
